title: Claude Managed Agents launches in public beta

structured_analysis.background: Anthropic Blog 于 2026-04-08 发布相关动态。
structured_analysis.key_action: Anthropic launched Claude Managed Agents in public beta on April 8, 2026
structured_analysis.technical_implication: The service provides a suite of composable APIs for building and deploying cloud-hosted agents at scale

trend_insight: 产品发布正在强调可用性、工具调用与企业场景落地。
risk_or_opportunity: 若能力稳定并形成生态支持，该方向有机会快速进入实际落地阶段。
original_title: Claude Managed Agents launches in public beta
